_note: KIE/Suno V5 instrumental. 10/13 tracks downloaded + trimmed to ~48s loops (loudnorm -18 LUFS, seam fades). music.js lazy-loads audio/<track>.mp3 and degrades silently if absent.

credit_blocked._reason: KIE account ran out of credits mid-batch. Top up at kie.ai, then re-generate these 3 boss themes and drop them in audio/ (music.js picks them up automatically).
credit_blocked.boss_prism: crystalline bright-menace boss, shimmering refracting synths, sharp luminous danger, looping, no vocals
credit_blocked.boss_maw: heavy collapsing drone boss, deep crushing sub bass, gravity black-hole dread, slow menace, looping, no vocals
credit_blocked.boss_duo: dual interweaving boss battle, two call-and-response melodic lines, twin symmetrical tension, driving, looping, no vocals

recipe: suno_generate_music(customMode:true, instrumental:true, model:V5, style:<above>, title:<track>) -> wait_for_task -> curl audioUrl -> ffmpeg -ss 10 -t 48 -af loudnorm=I=-18:TP=-1.5,afade... -> audio/<track>.mp3
